name: Van's Faves
recipeInstructions:
Use the best quality chocolate you can; it makes a difference.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Melt butter in a small pan or microwaveable bowl and add rolled oats; stir until all oats are coated with butter. Set aside.
Beat egg until foamy. Add sugar and beat until light. Add baking powder and flour to the egg mixture. Then mix in the oatmeal/butter mixture. Stir in the orange rind.
Grease and flour a cookie sheet. Drop batter, about 1/2 tablespoon at a time, about 3 inches apart on cookie sheets (these do spread as they cook). Bake for 8-12 minutes, watching carefully. Baking time will depend on individual ovens. Once they start to caramelize, remove from oven when cookies are golden. Allow to cool about 1 minute, then remove from cookie sheet onto cooling racks.
When cookies are cool, melt chocolate square in a double boiler or nuke on Low in microwave until melted, stirring frequently, making sure not to let chocolate burn. Allowing chocolate to drip off the tip of a table knife, drizzle cookies lightly with chocolate. Store in airtight tins.
Yields 4 Dozen
